summary: Solid test suite with excellent workflow validation. labeler.test.ts covers all core features (globs, priorities, groups, errors) and config parsing thoroughly. cli.test.ts validates all three input methods (stdin, file, positional) with proper exit codes and JSON output parsing. workflow.test.ts excels with both fast structure tests (YAML, actionlint, path validation) and three representative act-backed end-to-end cases with exact output matching and artifact capture. Strengths: good organization, clear naming, proper test isolation, strong act coverage per task constraints. Weaknesses: labeler and cli tests focus on happy paths and obvious errors, missing edge cases like special characters, malformed input combinations, concurrent access; workflow tests hardcode PROJECT_FILES list and lack validation that act/docker are installed; could reduce boilerplate via shared fixtures. Would catch most regressions effectively.
